description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style SUV with a boxy blue body and a black soft-top roof, reminiscent of classic off-road vehicles like the Willys Jeep. The vehicle features prominent round headlights, a vertical slatted front grille, and a robust front bumper. Both sides have large, silver side steps and visible door outlines, with the rear showcasing an externally mounted spare tire and a jerry can. The wheels are rugged with deep-treaded tires, suitable for both urban and off-road environments. The windows are large and rectangular, providing good visibility, and the overall design emphasizes utility and durability.
description: A classic blue SUV with a black soft-top, round headlights, rugged tires, and an externally mounted spare tire and jerry can.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the spare tire, jerry can, and the back window of the soft-top roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue body, black soft-top, silver side step, and rugged wheels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the round headlights, vertical grille, and robust front bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with the jerry can and spare tire visible at the rear.
attribute_wheel_design: five-spoke steel rims with deep-treaded tires
